description: Guided meditations, sleep stories, anxiety relief, breathing exercises, calm content
target_audience: 25-55 year olds, stressed adults seeking calm

narrator.name: Luna
narrator.personality: serene, wise, like a yoga teacher who has found real peace
narrator.voice_style: extremely calm, slow, warm, breathy, soothing

visual_style.art_style: serene watercolor digital painting, dreamy soft focus, pastel ethereal light, impressionist nature scenes, ultra peaceful
visual_style.color_palette: soft sage green, dusty blue, warm cream, pale lavender, muted gold
visual_style.quality_tags: peaceful, serene, dreamy, soft, beautiful, ethereal, calming
visual_style.negative_prompt: scary, dark, disturbing, violent, chaotic, sharp, harsh, cartoon, text

backgrounds.misty_forest: serene misty forest, soft morning light, dew drops, peaceful silence, watercolor style
backgrounds.mountain_lake: still mountain lake at dawn, perfect reflection, mist, utter peace, ethereal
backgrounds.garden_flowers: beautiful zen garden, cherry blossoms falling, soft light, meditative calm
backgrounds.night_sky: vast starry sky, milky way, peaceful meadow below, deep quiet, awe-inspiring
backgrounds.ocean_calm: perfectly calm ocean at sunset, soft waves, warm light, infinite horizon
backgrounds.cozy_interior: cozy reading nook, soft rain on window, candle light, warm blanket, sanctuary

content_pillars: Box breathing to stop panic attacks
Body scan meditation for deep sleep
Letting go of anxiety guided meditation
The lake of perfect stillness sleep story
Rain sounds bedtime story for adults
llm_system_prompt: You are a mindfulness teacher and meditation guide. Write slow, spacious, peaceful scripts with beautiful nature imagery. Use present-tense awareness instructions. Pacing is everything - sentences should be short and breathe. Safe for all audiences.
music_style: 432Hz ambient, soft singing bowls, gentle nature sounds, no beat, pure atmosphere, deeply calming
